name: non-technical-role
description: Conversation with non-technical role (Product Manager) correcting documentation

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: The user story describes: 'As a user, I want to login to the system so that I can access my account.'

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Let's rephrase that to be more action-oriented: 'As a user, I want to securely authenticate so that I can access my personalized dashboard.'

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: I'll document the acceptance criteria as: 'User can enter username and password'

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Please use 'Given-When-Then' format: 'Given I am on the login page, When I enter valid credentials, Then I should be redirected to my dashboard'

conversation.speaker: AI
conversation.message: The PRD states the feature should be completed 'by next week'

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Let's use specific sprint dates: 'Completed by Sprint 14 (ending March 28th)'

corrections.ai_suggestion: User can enter username and password

expected_analysis.analysis_summary: Product Manager user prefers precise terminology, structured acceptance criteria format, and specific sprint dates

expected_patterns.description: Prefers structured formats (Given-When-Then) for acceptance criteria
Prefers precise, action-oriented terminology over generic terms
Prefers specific sprint dates over vague timelines
examples: by next week → Completed by Sprint 14 (ending March 28th)
